source_files: src/systems/smoke_zone_tick.js — SPAWN_PROB 0.8, Y_BASE 0.5, Y_RAND_SCALE 1.5 (legacy emission params consumed by hazard-zone-smoke tuning, not this particle tuning)
notes: Soft grey puff (color 0xd4d4d4 = 13948116, emissive 0x545454 = 5526612 intensity 0.25). Translucent, lo-poly (6×6 segments). Default ttl 2.2s — long enough to drift into a cloud, short enough that the emitter keeps churn going.
